data.title: Russia Expands Siberian Factories to Boost Explosive Production Amid Conflict
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, recent government documents and satellite images reveal that Russia is undertaking significant factory expansions in remote Siberia to increase the production of a powerful explosive used in artillery shells and other ammunition amid the ongoing conflict with Ukraine.

Moscow's possession of more artillery shells than Ukraine has been a crucial factor in its battlefield successes during the conflict, where both sides primarily rely on artillery and drones. Three defense analysts suggest that as Ukraine and its Western allies ramp up weapon production, Russia's project is expected to enhance explosive output, potentially strengthening Moscow's firepower significantly.

data.title: Get 512 SXT rewards if you reach 150 points on Binance Alpha
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance announced that it will airdrop 512 SXT tokens to qualified users with Alpha points of 150 points. The airdrop will be issued within 10 minutes after the launch of SXT Alpha. At the same time, users with Alpha points between 66 and 149 points and Binance UID ending with 1 will have the opportunity to receive a lucky airdrop reward of 512 SXT.

data.title: CatFee TRON Energy Leasing Platform has been newly upgraded, with over 10,000 service orders per day, saving over 300,000 TRX
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: CatFee, the TRON ecological energy leasing platform, recently completed a comprehensive system upgrade. The platform's average daily energy delivery service orders exceeded 30,000 orders, saving users more than 300,000 TRX gas fees per day, greatly improving users' transfer experience and cost control capabilities on the TRON network.
It is reported that CatFee is a C2C energy trading platform under 100cat. It is currently actively deploying the C-end energy wholesale market and matching energy leasing needs between users through matching transactions. With its stable supply mechanism and automated matching system, the platform has become one of the options for Web3 users to save gas fees when using TRC20 transfers and using TRON energy.

data.title: Michael Saylor Advocates Bitcoin Investment for Saudi Sovereign Wealth Fund
data.description: According to PANews, Michael Saylor, Chairman of the Board at Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), suggested in an interview with Saudi National Television that the Saudi Sovereign Wealth Fund should invest in Bitcoin. Saylor emphasized that purchasing Bitcoin could potentially increase the fund's value significantly, stating, "If you want your money to grow a thousandfold, then buy Bitcoin." The Saudi Sovereign Wealth Fund is reported to have assets totaling $930 billion.

data.title: Safeheron launches open source TEE framework based on Intel SGX
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Digital asset infrastructure provider Safeheron has officially released an open source trusted execution environment (TEE) framework based on Intel SGX SDK, aiming to enhance the security and privacy protection of Web3 fields such as DeFi, payment, and DAO. The framework is developed using modern C++ and can create a secure "enclave" in any cloud service that supports Intel SGX. Safeheron said that the current industry is increasingly concerned about closed systems, so it decided to open source the framework to accelerate ecological innovation. Its customers include MetaMask, Doo Group and Amber Group, and the cumulative transfer amount has exceeded US$10 billion. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Oregon Updates Commercial Code to Include Digital Assets
data.description:
According to PANews, Oregon Governor Tina Kotek signed Senate Bill 167 on May 7, updating the state's commercial regulations to align with the Uniform Commercial Code (UCC) by incorporating provisions related to digital assets. The new legislation introduces Article 12 of the UCC, establishing a legal framework for cryptocurrencies, tokenized records, and electronic money. It also amends Article 9 of the UCC to allow digital assets to be used as collateral in secured transactions. Additionally, the bill recognizes the legal validity of electronic records, electronic signatures, and hybrid transactions to support digital commerce development. The new regulations include transitional provisions to ensure that transactions conducted before the law's enactment remain legally valid and provide a one-year grace period for existing security interests to comply.

Another cryptocurrency-related bill in Oregon, House Bill 2071, is still in the legislative process and has not yet reached the voting stage. This bill aims to protect the rights to use Bitcoin and other digital assets by prohibiting state and local governments from restricting individuals from accepting cryptocurrency as payment for goods or services and ensuring the legality of peer-to-peer blockchain transactions. Currently, Oregon has not proposed legislation to establish a state Bitcoin reserve, unlike some other states.

data.title: Binance Wallet ranks first in transaction volume, accounting for 80% of the total transaction volume of mainstream wallets
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Dune data, Binance Wallet's transaction volume has accounted for 82.1% of the total transaction volume of mainstream crypto wallets, ranking first. Next is OKX Wallet/DEX, which accounts for 3%, TokenPocket accounts for 2.4%, Phantom accounts for 2.3%, Bitget Wallet accounts for 1.7%, Coinbase accounts for 1.6%, and MetaMask accounts for 0.7%.
However, according to the number of active transaction addresses, OKX Wallet API accounts for 20.4%, ranking first, and Binance Wallet accounts for 19.7%, ranking second.

data.title: Whale Address Resumes Staking with 20,000 SOL After Nine-Month Hiatus
data.description: According to Odaily, a whale address has resumed activity by staking 20,000 SOL after approximately nine months of inactivity. At the current market price, this amount is valued at around $3.02 million. The total staked amount from this address now stands at 128,384 SOL, with an estimated total value of $19.6 million.
